title: narcissus tazetta var. ochroleucus
intro: Narcissus tazetta var. ochroleucus, also known as the Yellow Narcissus or Daffodil, is a species of bulbous perennial plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Narcissus tazetta var. ochroleucus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
